title: NFT Transfer Tracker
description: Monitor NFT mints, transfers, and burns by scanning ERC-20/ERC-721 transfer events for a wallet — tracks who sent and received each NFT with timestamps and tx hashes.
useCase: Build an NFT transfer notification system that alerts users when NFTs enter or leave their wallet — mint detector, transfer feed, and burn tracker in one.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to track NFT movements for
